title: What's new in Cloud Run
summary: Google Cloud announced new Cloud Run capabilities designed to simplify deployment of AI agents and inference workloads. The updates focus on serverless features that enable seamless scaling and reduce operational overhead for AI-driven applications.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech video covers new Cloud Run capabilities aimed at simplifying the deployment of AI agents and inference workloads. The updates center on serverless features that handle scaling automatically and reduce the operational overhead of running AI-driven applications. The key takeaway: Cloud Run is being positioned to make serverless deployment of agents and inference more direct, with scaling managed by the platform rather than the developer.
